items.title: Devine and Tahuhu announce international sign-off after T20 World Cup
items.summary: Nensi Patel, Izzy Sharp, Bree Illing, Flora Devonshire and Polly Inglis will play their first T20 World Cups
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: 'Felt defeated so many times': Manu revisits journey amid Sooryavanshi row
items.summary: Two-time Olympic medallist Manu Bhaker celebrated 10 years in shooting with an emotional Instagram post reflecting on her journey, setbacks and achievements. Bhaker recalled ove...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: A record-breaking semi-final - the antidote to modern football?
items.summary: A scintillating semi-final first leg between Paris St-Germain and Bayern Munich left many to wonder if this was the antidote to modern football.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
